description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a weathered green exterior and graffiti-style artwork reading 'GLOP' on both side panels. The cabinet features a prominent control panel with a green joystick and two red buttons, set into a slightly recessed area below the screen. The front lower section includes a coin slot and a rectangular access panel, both outlined in black and yellow. The top of the cabinet displays a small marquee area with the same 'GLOP' graffiti, though it is partially faded. The surface of the cabinet appears worn and textured, with visible rust and paint chipping, suggesting long-term outdoor or urban use. The overall shape is angular and boxy, typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A weathered green arcade game cabinet with graffiti artwork, joystick, buttons, and a coin slot, showing signs of age and urban use.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'GLOP' graffiti, green textured surface, and the angular profile of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, weathered green back panel with some rust and no visible features or artwork.
description_view_2: Right side view similar to the left, with 'GLOP' graffiti and the cabinet's angular silhouette.
description_view_3: Front view showing the control panel with joystick and buttons, the screen area, coin slot, and a small marquee with faded artwork.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size, with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one green joystick on the left and two red buttons to the right, set in a rectangular black panel
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'GLOP' in graffiti-style yellow and pink text on a green background, partially faded
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Graffiti-style 'GLOP' text in yellow and pink with a white glow on both side panels
